Defines firmware offsets and a function to check if the firmware is "new world."

# Purpose
This header file defines constants and a function related to firmware management for an STM32 microcontroller. It includes the `stm32f2xx.h` header, which suggests it is intended for use with STM32F2 series microcontrollers. The code defines offsets and base addresses for two firmware versions, referred to as "Old World" and "New World," using preprocessor macros. The `firmware_is_new_world` function prototype indicates that the code provides functionality to determine if a given firmware base address corresponds to the "New World" firmware version. This code is intended to be included in other C++ source files that require these firmware management utilities.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stm32f2xx.h`
